Package microui.core.interfaces

Interface ValuePreviewSource

All Known Implementing Classes:
Knob, LinearRangeControl, RangeControl, Scroll, Slider
public interface ValuePreviewSource
An interface for components that have data to display on top of everything on the screen

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getSource()
    Returns the text to display as a string.
    boolean
    isContentPrepared()
    Checks if the content is ready for display.

  • Method Details

    • getSource

      String getSource()
      Returns the text to display as a string.
      Returns:
      the current text to display as a string

    • isContentPrepared

      boolean isContentPrepared()
      Checks if the content is ready for display.
      Returns:
      true if ready and false if not
